card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 6, your opponent must skip their next turn.

plan.title: Test Black Dragon: 027-E01 APPLY_SKIP_TURN

steps: Create the effect scenario match from this plan.

expectedAssertions.label: Source card exists in the generated match catalog.
